prompt:
Create a cinematic vertical-friendly background image for a faceless short-form video.

Short title: 7 Reasons Your Prayer Feels Unanswered (Quick Audit)
Niche: Faith + Psychology + Encouragement
Tone: encouraging, calm, biblical

Requirements:
- No text
- No logos
- No watermarks
- No readable signage
- Clean center composition for captions
- Strong emotional clarity
- Vertical-video friendly composition
- Suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, and YouTube Shorts
- Avoid extreme close-up faces
- Prefer symbolic, atmospheric, or scenic imagery over identifiable people

Style:
cinematic, dramatic but tasteful, soft lighting, polished, realistic

Short script context:
Your prayer is heard—here is what to check next. First, examine your motives; James 4:3 warns wrong desires can block answers, so ask God to purify your heart with Psalm 139. Second, release unforgiveness—Mark 11:25 invites letting go so prayers flow. Third, remember God's timing; some answers are seasons, not seconds. Fourth, pray through spiritual warfare with Scripture and persistence. Fifth, check your persistence—Luke 18 calls us to keep knocking. Sixth, are you being tested in stewardship? Be faithful in small things. Seventh, God may be redirecting—trust Romans 8:28. Download the 7-day Prayer Audit to walk it out.
